message.content:
Remove unused code from atomic components based on this list. For each file, read it first, then remove ONLY the unused exports/imports listed. Do NOT remove entire files, just the unused items.

## src/atomic/atoms/index.ts
Remove these unused exports (lines 3-55):
- Line 3: ContentWithSkeletonWrapper
- Line 5: Input
- Line 6: Modal
- Line 9: BoxAuto
- Line 10: BoxBackgroundImage
- Line 12: BoxBetween
- Line 13: BoxCenter
- Line 15: BoxFull
- Line 16: BoxHeight
- Line 17: BoxSafe
- Line 18: BoxScrollView
- Line 19: BoxShadow

- Line 22: BoxTouchable

- Line 26: BoxAbsoluteRight
- Line 27: HorizontalSeparator

- Line 38: AnimatedBox
- Line 41: H0

## src/atomic/molecules/ControlledTextInput/Models/index.ts

## src/atomic/molecules/PreventDoubleClickButton/index.tsx

## src/atomic/organisms/ApiError/styles.ts

## src/atomic/organisms/BenefitBackDrop/index.tsx

## src/atomic/organisms/BenefitList/Models/index.ts

## src/atomic/organisms/BenefitList/index.tsx

## src/atomic/organisms/CashbackCellDropdown/Models/index.tsx
- Line 6: Remove unused `ItemIconDataByType`
- Line 27: Remove unused `args` parameter

## src/atomic/organisms/FiltersBottomSheet/index.tsx

## src/atomic/organisms/LearnMorePointsSection/Models/index.ts

## src/atomic/organisms/MyCards/Models/index.ts
- Lines 12-15: Remove PHYSICAL, VIRTUAL, TAG, ADDITIONAL
- Lines 19-25: Remove TAG, ACTIVATE_CARD, VIRTUAL, PHYSICAL, BLOCKED, CANCELED, DELIVERY_FAILED
- Lines 29-35: Remove unused parameters (item, blocked, blockedTypes, hideNumberCard)
- Line 52: Remove unused `data`

## src/atomic/organisms/MyCards/index.tsx
- Line 652: Remove unused `UnconnectedMyCards`

## src/atomic/organisms/MyCards/view.tsx

## src/atomic/organisms/PointsInfoBottomSheet/index.tsx

## src/atomic/templates/BasicPage/Models/index.ts

## src/atomic/templates/BasicPage/index.tsx
- Line 18: Remove unused `updateLeadLastPage`

## src/atomic/templates/BasicPage/styles.tsx

## src/atomic/templates/InvoiceStatus/view.tsx

After making all changes, confirm what was removed.

content.content:
1→import { useNavigation } from '@react-navigation/native';
     2→import {
     3→  Box,
     4→  Button,
     5→  LimitCard,
     6→  QuickAccess,
     7→  SeparatorHorizontal,
     8→  StatusValues,
     9→  Text,
    10→  TextIcon,
    11→} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
    12→import React from 'react';
    13→import { eventSelectContent } from '~/constants/functions';
    14→import { moment } from '../../../services/moment';
    15→import {
    16→  formatToCurrency,
    17→  transformInvoiceToPattern,
    18→} from '../../../utils/functions';
    19→import { InvoiceStatusViewProps } from './Models';
    20→import { Container } from './styles';
    21→import { TextIconRewardProgram } from '../../molecules/TextIconRewardProgram';
    22→
    23→export const InvoiceStatusView = ({
    24→  invoiceStatusObject,
    25→  showValue,
    26→  productsReducer,
    27→  carrouselItems,
    28→  invoiceData,
    29→  invoiceType,
    30→  isAutoDebt,
    31→  loadingProducts,
    32→}: InvoiceStatusViewProps) => {
    33→  const navigation = useNavigation();
    34→  return (
    35→    <Container>
    36→      <StatusValues
    37→        highlightTag
    38→        hasButtonSecundarySmall={invoiceStatusObject?.hasPaymentBtn}
    39→        textButtonSecondarySmall="Exibir fatura"
    40→        {...invoiceStatusObject}
    41→        onPressSecundarySmall={() => {
    42→          eventSelectContent({
    43→            content_type: 'cta',
    44→            content_id: 'ver_fatura',
    45→            location_1: 'autosservico',
    46→            location_2: 'spmais',
    47→            location_3: 'home_spmais',
    48→          });
    49→          navigation.navigate('InvoiceCard', {
    50→            dueDate: invoiceData.Vencimento,
    51→            date: moment().toISOString(),
    52→            analytics: {
    53→              screen_name: 'spmais',
    54→              screen_class: 'home_spmais',
    55→              screen_bussines: 'autosservico',
    56→              screen_info: {
    57→                location_1: 'autosservico',
    58→                location_2: 'spmais',
    59→                location_3: 'home_spmais',
    60→              },
    61→            },
    62→          });
    63→        }}
    64→        value={formatToCurrency(invoiceData.Valor)}
    65→        showValue={showValue}
    66→        valueColor="INTENSE_COLOR_01"
    67→        colorDotIcon="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
    68→        colorDate="INTENSE_COLOR_01"
    69→      />
    70→      <Box width="100%" direction align="center" mt="quark">
    71→        <Text
    72→          testID="textInvoiceType"
    73→          maxWidth="100%"
    74→          maxFontSizeMultiplier={1.6}
    75→          numberOfLines={1}
    76→          type="paragraphMD"
    77→          color="INTENSE_COLOR_02"
    78→        >
    79→          {invoiceType === 'default' ? 'Fechamento ' : 'Vencimento '}
    80→          {moment(
    81→            invoiceType === 'default'
    82→              ? invoiceData.DataDeCorte
    83→              : invoiceData.VencimentoOriginal,
    84→          ).format('DD/MM')}
    85→        </Text>
    86→      </Box>
    87→      {(invoiceStatusObject?.hasInstallmentBtn ||
    88→        invoiceStatusObject?.hasPaymentOptionBtn) && (
    89→        <Box direction justify="space-between" mt="xxxs">
    90→          <Box width="100%">
    91→            <Button
    92→              testID="btnInvoiceStatusPayInvoice"
    93→              type="primaryLarge"
    94→              text="Pagar fatura"
    95→              onPress={() => {
    96→                eventSelectContent({
    97→                  content_type: 'cta',
    98→                  content_id: 'pagar_fatura',
    99→                  location_1: 'autosservico',
   100→                  location_2: 'spmais',
   101→                  location_3: 'home_spmais',
   102→                });
   103→                navigation.navigate('PayInvoice', {
   104→                  payment: transformInvoiceToPattern(invoiceData),
   105→                  analytics: {
   106→                    screen_name: 'spmais',
   107→                    screen_class: 'home_spmais',
   108→                    screen_bussines: 'autosservico',
   109→                    screen_info: {
   110→                      location_1: 'autosservico',
   111→                      location_2: 'spmais',
   112→                      location_3: 'home_spmais',
   113→                    },
   114→                  },
   115→                });
   116→              }}
   117→            />
   118→          </Box>
   119→        </Box>
   120→      )}
   121→
   122→      <LimitCard
   123→        limitTotal={productsReducer?.Limite}
   124→        limitUsed={productsReducer?.Limite - productsReducer?.LimiteDisponivel}
   125→        textLimitUsed="Limite utilizado"
   126→        textLimitValue="Disponível"
   127→        mt="xs"
   128→        hideBgColor
   129→        showLimitAvailable={showValue}
   130→        showLimitUse={showValue}
   131→        hidePadding
   132→        bgBarColor="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
   133→        isLoading={loadingProducts}
   134→      />
   135→
   136→      {invoiceData.MelhorDiaCompra ? (
   137→        <Box width="100%" direction align="center" mt="xxs">
   138→          <Text
   139→            testID="textInvoiceStatusBestDayToBuy"
   140→            maxWidth="100%"
   141→            maxFontSizeMultiplier={1.6}
   142→            numberOfLines={1}
   143→            type="paragraphMD"
   144→            color="INTENSE_COLOR_02"
   145→          >
   146→            Melhor dia de compra:{' '}
   147→            {moment(invoiceData.MelhorDiaCompra).format('DD/MM')}
   148→          </Text>
   149→        </Box>
   150→      ) : null}
   151→
   152→      <SeparatorHorizontal bgColor="INTENSE_COLOR_05" height={1} mt="xs" />
   153→      <TextIconRewardProgram showValue={showValue} />
   154→      {isAutoDebt && (
   155→        <TextIcon
   156→          mt="xxs"
   157→          type="price"
   158→          description="Débito em conta ativo"
   159→          iconName="icon-debit-account"
   160→          iconSize="sm"
   161→          bgIconColor="transparent"
   162→          testID="textInvoiceStatusAutoDebt"
   163→          iconColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
   164→          textColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
   165→          priceValueColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
   166→          bulletColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
   167→        />
   168→      )}
   169→      <QuickAccess type="magenta" data={carrouselItems} mt="xs" themes="dark" />
   170→    </Container>
   171→  );
   172→};
   173→
   174→

<system-reminder>
Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>

content.text: Now I have read all the files. Let me analyze the actual content and make the necessary edits. The `src/atomic/atoms/index.ts` file has already been cleaned up - it only contains the exports that are still in use. Let me now proceed with the other files.
